zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持窄幅震荡，价格运行于2096附近，24小时涨幅有限，显示市场多空力量暂时均衡。由于价格仍低于20日均线2111一线，短线整体结构偏弱，市场情绪仍以谨慎观望为主。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持负值，说明空头动能尚未完全消退，短周期仍存在回调压力。尽管RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格未能有效突破均线压制，反映买盘跟进力度不足，反弹持续性仍需确认。

关键支撑位可关注2090及2080区域，若跌破可能进一步测试2060附近低点；上方阻力则集中在2110至2130区间，尤其20日均线附近存在较强抛压。短线若放量突破2115，行情有望转向修复反弹。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可在2090附近轻仓尝试低吸，但需严格设置止损。稳健投资者建议等待价格重新站稳2115上方后再考虑跟进多单，目前阶段更适合区间交易与控制仓位风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2096.19, holding within a narrow intraday range between 2091.93 and 2096.28. Price action remains slightly bearish in the short term, primarily because ETH continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 2111.66. This positioning suggests sellers still maintain modest control despite the relatively flat 24-hour change. Momentum appears subdued rather than aggressively negative, indicating the market may currently be consolidating before its next directional move.

The MACD reading at -4.39566 reflects weakening bullish momentum and hints at ongoing downside pressure. Although the signal line and RSI values are unavailable, the negative MACD alone suggests buyers have not yet regained meaningful strength. The tight trading band also indicates reduced volatility, often associated with indecision among participants. If Ethereum remains below the SMA resistance zone, short-term rallies may continue to face selling pressure near the 2105–2115 region.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is forming around 2090, with stronger downside protection likely near 2075. A breakdown below these levels could expose ETH to additional weakness toward the psychologically important 2050 area. On the upside, resistance is clearly concentrated near the SMA at 2111.66, followed by a secondary barrier around 2130. A decisive close above these levels would improve sentiment and potentially trigger renewed bullish momentum.

Traders may prefer a cautious approach until confirmation of direction emerges. Short-term bearish setups remain valid while price stays below the moving average, especially if volume increases during declines. Conservative buyers could wait for a sustained breakout above 2115 before entering long positions. Meanwhile, range traders may look for opportunities between 2090 support and 2110 resistance, using disciplined stop-loss placement due to the market’s currently compressed volatility conditions.
